content.en:
Time passes.

Gradually, the day of the closure of the samsaric fruit realm is approaching.

Whoa!!

One by one, the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the members of the Reincarnation Source Clan were moved out, and it was time to be forcibly kicked out.

Of course, they can also come out early.

However, there are a lot of treasures in the reincarnation fruit world, and no one wants to come out in advance.

Even if Ye Tian killed so many reincarnation source clans, the reincarnation fruit realm was very large, and it was not easy to encounter, so they were naturally not afraid.

......

The reincarnation fruit is outside the realm.

Yazu and the others were already waiting here, and they were all very nervous.

They are also afraid that the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan will suffer heavy losses, especially Ao Chen, who is a peerless genius who has awakened the supreme power of reincarnation, once it falls there, it will be a huge loss.

Airplanes!!!!

Space warps.

One by one, members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan came out.

When Yazu and the others saw Ao Chen's figure, they breathed a sigh of relief.

As long as the dust hasn't fallen, it doesn't matter.

In the blink of an eye, all the Origin Upper Realm Overlords who were still alive came out.

This time, the reincarnation celestial clan suffered very little loss, and only a few members of the reincarnation celestial clan fell in the reincarnation fruit realm.

On the other hand, on the side of the reincarnation source clan, the losses were extremely heavy, and only a few members of the reincarnation source clan returned.

"What's going on?"

Yizu asked.

Then.

Jiu Yuan stood up and said, "Lord Yizu, most of the other clansmen were killed by the Ao Chen of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and almost all of those Reincarnation Supreme Fruits were snatched by him!

"What!"

Yizu was a little incredulous.

His gaze looked at Ye Tian, revealing a puzzled look.

Ye Tian's cultivation of this Ao Chen's copy body is not high, how can he have such strength?

Subsequently.

The other reincarnation origins also talked about what had happened one by one.

After hearing this, Yizu was extremely angry and wanted to kill Aochen very much.

In his opinion, Aochen now has such strength, the threat is too great!

And Yazu was excited.

He didn't expect Ao Chen's strength to reach such a point, if Ao Chen's cultivation awakened two or three more times, and the awakening of the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, he would be invincible among the overlords of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm.

"Let's go, let's go back!"

Yazu said.

Yizu didn't do anything, and they wouldn't go to war directly for this.

Whether or not there can be a war can only be decided after the high-level deliberation of the entire Reincarnation Source Clan, and they don't dare to decide privately, they can only watch the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and them leave.

......

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

After coming back, Yazu and the others simply asked Ye Tian about the reincarnation fruit realm, and did not continue to ask.

But the name of Ao Chen has already resounded throughout the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan, after all, his combat power is too terrifying, and it is no longer something that can be said in a sentence of fighting beyond the level.

"I've obtained a lot of resources this time, so I won't meet with the real body copy body first, and then I'll send these resources back when the limelight is over!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He began his retreat.

I saw that he took out a reincarnation supreme fruit, and was ready to swallow the reincarnation supreme fruit to see if he could awaken the second reincarnation supreme divine power.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed this reincarnation supreme fruit, and then began to refine and improve.

With the passage of time, the bloodline of his replica body continued to improve, and streams of incomparably pure energy poured into the depths of the bloodline of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, as if to stimulate the energy in the bloodline.

At the same time, his cultivation was also improving, which was also an incidental effect of the supreme fruit of reincarnation.

Years passed, thousands of primeval epochs later, and this supreme fruit of reincarnation could be regarded as completely refined.

However, Ye Tian did not awaken the second reincarnation supreme divine power, but his cultivation improved a lot.

He had already reached the realm of the fourth balance, and now after taking the Supreme Fruit of Samsara was almost in the middle of the fourth balance.

This shows how good the effect of the supreme fruit of reincarnation is.

"Keep refining!"

The second reincarnation supreme fruit has a slightly worse improvement in cultivation, and it is not as good as the first reincarnation supreme fruit.

However, Ye Tian's main purpose is to awaken the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, if it is awakened, that is the real value.

However, the second Reincarnation Supreme Fruit still did not awaken his Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power.

"There is a one-third chance of failing twice, my luck is not very good, the third reincarnation supreme fruit should have hope for me to awaken the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, right?" Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He swallowed the third Supreme Fruit of Samsara Fruit.

This time, he was lucky.

Rumble!!!!

The second gate of reincarnation has awakened.

Soon, he was immersed in the second gate of reincarnation supreme supernatural powers.

Before you know it, tens of thousands of primeval years have passed.

At this time, he could be regarded as having completely mastered this second reincarnation supreme supernatural power.

【Reincarnation Flow Technique】

This is a body method speed type reincarnation supreme divine power, he has mastered such a reincarnation supreme divine power, and his strength has directly skyrocketed a lot.

Subsequently.

He went to the palace of Azu.

......

"Lord Yazu, I have successfully awakened the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Yazu said excitedly.

Although he also knew that Ao Chen was almost 100% able to awaken the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, after all, Ao Chen had obtained so many reincarnation supreme fruits, unless he was unlucky enough to go against the sky, he would all fail.

At this time, Ye Tian asked again: "Lord Yazu, can the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation allow me to awaken the Supreme Divine Power of the Third Gate?"

"Difficult!" Yazu shook his head and said: "You have already awakened two reincarnation supreme divine powers, if you take the reincarnation supreme fruit again, the chance of awakening the third reincarnation supreme divine power is estimated to be only one-third, so don't waste it! Wait for your cultivation to fall into a bottleneck in the future, and then use these reincarnation supreme fruits to break through!"

In fact, it is also the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan, and now no other clan can use the supreme fruit of reincarnation.

Several other reincarnation celestial clans who have awakened the reincarnation supreme divine power are either dead, or have reached nine awakenings, and they have created a lot of reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, and there is no need to waste the reincarnation supreme fruit to awaken the reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, and it will not help much in combat effectiveness.

Moreover, when it comes to the realm of nine awakenings, how powerful the bloodline is, if the reincarnation supreme fruit wants to make such a powerful bloodline awaken the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, the difficulty is also extremely huge, and it is almost impossible.

Therefore, he did not ask Ao Chen to take out the supreme fruit of reincarnation.
